passed.title: Batch pricing form works
evidence: Playwright interaction added two batch token rows (DAI + USDC), submitted Get Prices, and UI rendered 'Batch Results (2 tokens)' table with two result rows.

passed.title: Token classification form works
evidence: Playwright filled bucket token input with DAI and clicked Check Bucket; UI rendered Classification Result with Token, Chain=ethereum, Bucket='stable usd'.

passed.title: Server.py no longer contains INDEX_HTML
evidence: Grep for 'INDEX_HTML' in src/server.py returned no matches.
Route evidence from src/server.py: @app.get('/') returns FileResponse(index.html) from STATIC_DIR.

passed.title: Static extraction preserves deploy compatibility
evidence: docker compose build completed successfully for all chain images (exit 0).
docker compose up -d recreated chain containers successfully.
curl -sf http://localhost:8000/ includes <script src='/static/js/app.js'></script>, confirming UI is served through nginx with static assets.

frictions: Initial post-recreate health checks required extra wait before nginx routing returned 200 for app endpoints.
summary: Tested 5 assertions and all 5 passed. Batch and bucket UI flows worked via browser interactions, static Uniswap tokenlist endpoint returned valid tokenlist JSON, server.py no longer contains inline INDEX_HTML, and docker build/deploy-local cycle still serves the extracted static UI through nginx.
